evidence_summary: To demonstrate Carter's martial prowess and escalate the tension through violence.

Distraught by Dejah's declaration, Carter abandons his post to find her. He is intercepted in an antechamber by four Zodangan guardsmen. A brutal twenty-minute combat ensues, resulting in the death of all four guards.
